title: Classy
description: Eva-Jade Andrews (So you Think You’re Funny Semi-finalist 2025, Komedia New Comedian of the Year Semi-finalist 2026) and Chiff Powell (winner of mild mannered tax advisor of the year – this may not be an actual award) come from different backgrounds. Eva-Jade is fiercely proud of being working class. Chiff is painfully embarrassed of being middle class. Join them and some special guests for an hour of comedy where they may consider if it matters if you fill the kettle to the top before boiling it or whether your boiling water tap needs upgrading. Or, they may just tell some great jokes and you’ll have an amazing time and not really care what class people are just as long as they remain classy.
